nodes.name: Webhook — Receive PAC008 Transaction
nodes.notes: Entry point. Receives PAC008 payment transaction as JSON POST body.

nodes.name: Mock DB — Sanctions Watchlist Check
nodes.notes: Simulates sanctions_watchlist DB table. No real DB needed. Add real entries to watchlist array to test different scenarios.

nodes.name: Set — Prepare AI Context
nodes.notes: Combines PAC008 transaction data with DB watchlist results into one payload for AI Agent.

parameters.text:
=You are a senior AML Compliance Officer at a bank.

Analyze the following PAC008 payment transaction and database watchlist screening result.

PAC008 TRANSACTION:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.txn_data, null, 2) }}

DATABASE WATCHLIST RESULT:
{{ JSON.stringify($json.watchlist_hits, null, 2) }}

DB HIT FLAG: {{ $json.db_hit }}

Screening Timestamp: {{ $json.screening_timestamp }}

Based on AML rules, sanctions screening, and fraud indicators, return ONLY a JSON object:
{
  "hit": true or false,
  "risk_level": "HIGH" or "MEDIUM" or "LOW",
  "reason": "Clear explanation of decision",
  "action": "BLOCK" or "PROCESS" or "MANUAL_REVIEW",
  "txn_ref": "txn_ref from input",
  "status": "PENDING" or "PASSED" or "REJECTED",
  "screened_by": "AI_COMPLIANCE_AGENT",
  "aml_flags": ["list of specific flags found"],
  "recommendation": "Next step for compliance team"
}

Return ONLY the JSON. No text before or after.

options.systemMessage: You are a senior AML Compliance Officer. You screen payment transactions for fraud, money laundering, and sanctions violations. You always return structured JSON only — never plain text. You are thorough, accurate, and follow FATF, OFAC, and PSD2 compliance guidelines.

nodes.name: AI Agent — AML Compliance Screener
nodes.notes: Core AI compliance decision engine. Connect your Groq or OpenAI credential here.

nodes.name: Groq — llama3-8b
nodes.notes: LLM model. Replace with OpenAI node if preferred.

nodes.name: Memory — Window Buffer
nodes.notes: Stores last 10 transaction decisions for AI context.

nodes.name: Code — Parse AI Decision
nodes.notes: Parses and cleans AI agent JSON response. Handles errors gracefully.

nodes.name: IF — HIT or NO HIT
nodes.notes: Routes transaction: TRUE = fraud hit (block), FALSE = clear (process)

nodes.name: Set — BLOCK Transaction
nodes.notes: HIT path: Sets transaction to PENDING, moves to repair/manual review queue.

nodes.name: Set — PROCESS Transaction
nodes.notes: NO HIT path: Transaction cleared. Status PASSED with TXN REF captured.

nodes.name: Mock DB — Update Transaction Status
nodes.notes: Simulates UPDATE to payment_transactions table. Logs what would be written. Replace with real PostgreSQL node when DB is available.

nodes.name: Code — Prepare Excel Row
nodes.notes: Formats compliance report row with all required fields for Excel export.

nodes.name: Excel — Append to Compliance Report
nodes.notes: Appends compliance decision row to Excel report. Update filePath to your server path.

nodes.name: IF — Send Alert?
nodes.notes: Only sends email alert if transaction was flagged (HIT = true or MANUAL_REVIEW).

parameters.subject: =🚨 AML HIT — Transaction {{ $json.TXN_REF }} Flagged | Risk: {{ $json.RISK_LEVEL }}
parameters.message:
=

🚨 AML Compliance Alert

Transaction Reference: {{ $json.TXN_REF }}

Status: {{ $json.STATUS }}

Risk Level: {{ $json.RISK_LEVEL }}

Action Taken: {{ $json.ACTION }}

AI Reason: {{ $json.REASON }}

AML Flags: {{ $json.AML_FLAGS }}

Queue: {{ $json.QUEUE }}

Screened By: {{ $json.SCREENED_BY }}

Decision Time: {{ $json.DECISION_TIMESTAMP }}

This alert was generated automatically by the AML Compliance AI Screening Workflow.

Please review and take appropriate action in the compliance portal.

nodes.name: Email — Alert Compliance Team
nodes.notes: Sends HTML email alert to compliance team. Replace email address. Swap Gmail for SMTP if needed.

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, txn_ref: $('Code — Parse AI Decision').item.json.txn_ref, status: $('Code — Parse AI Decision').item.json.status, action: $('Code — Parse AI Decision').item.json.action, risk_level: $('Code — Parse AI Decision').item.json.risk_level, screened_by: 'AI_COMPLIANCE_AGENT', timestamp: $('Code — Parse AI Decision').item.json.processed_at }) }}

nodes.name: Respond — Return Screening Result
nodes.notes: Returns final JSON response to the caller with screening decision.
